'''''Glich''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] encountered by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] on his first sortie at [[Outpost D-34]].

==Behind the scenes==
''Glich'' is not specifically described in ''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', but mentioned only by name under mission goals for the first mission of the [[Aftermath of Hoth|Hoth Aftermath]] campaign. This craft will appear only on the hardest difficulty setting, and should be destroyed to complete one of two bonus goals.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
